embeddings._comment: Set enabled=false to skip (no ML deps needed)

quality_gates._comment: Set enabled=false for faster runs without quality checks

multi_model._comment: Set enabled=true and add OPENAI_API_KEY / GOOGLE_API_KEY env vars for multi-model

citation_expansion._comment: Expands novelty search via Semantic Scholar citation graph

dashboard._comment: Generates interactive HTML dashboard in output/
